news.title: Snap gets closer to releasing new AI glasses after years-long hiatus

news.title: Florida AG to probe OpenAI, alleging possible connection to FSU shooting
news.summary: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier plans to investigate OpenAI for its alleged harm to minors, potential to threaten national security, and its possible link to a shooting at Florida State University last year.

news.title: ChatGPT finally offers $100/month Pro plan
news.summary: OpenAI announced on Thursday something that power users have been asking for: a $100/month plan. Previously, subscriptions jumped from $20 to $200 per month.

news.title: Snap is sticking with Qualcomm for its next AR glasses

news.title: Gen Z’s love-hate relationship with AI
news.summary: Gen Z is increasingly disillusioned with AI - just not enough to stop using it.
